summary: Reposted news segment about HVAC and skilled-trade careers, shown in a vertical crop. A young man works on an outdoor HVAC unit beside a building wall, with a roll of tape and ductwork nearby; a burned-in caption reads 'STARTED IN HIGH SCHOOL.' The audio describes HVAC expertise and the heart of the system. The tweet text quotes someone who bought a first house at twenty.
